description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:edge Docker image and caches the _ccache directory for ccache. Define two stages, build and release. In the build stage add five jobs—build-applet-alpine, build-glib-translator-main, build-gtk-module-main, build-jayatana-main, and build-registrar-main—each running an apk add command to install required packages, optionally exporting VERSION=$(git describe --abbrev=0), then executing meson configure, meson compile, meson install --no-rebuild, and meson dist, and publishing the resulting *.tar.xz files from build/meson-dist as artifacts that expire in one week. In the release stage add a release-main job that runs only on tags, installs python3 and pip, installs the gitlab-release tool via pip, and runs gitlab-release --link-in-desc --link-artifact *.tar.xz to attach all built tarballs as release artifacts.
